case_title: RICHARDSON, FRED VS NAME : PAC BELL WIRELESS

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NAME   : PAC BELL WIRELESS
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF FREDERICK RICHARDSON IN SUPPORT OF OF MOTION TO DISQUALIFY JUDGE.
OEX WAS SERVED ON OLIVIA GOMEZ, AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR PAC BELL WIRELESS; DAVID WONG NO LONGER WORKS FOR PAC BELL WIRELESS; DECLARATION ON FILE.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY WONG, DAVID HEARING SET FOR OCT-21-1999 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
POS AND ORIGINAL APPLICATION FOR OEX FILED; ORIGINAL APPLICATION IS FOR DAVID WONG, AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR PAC BELL WIRELESS.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF OCT-21-1999, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM OCT-21-1999 TO NOV-15-1999 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506 AS TO THIRD PARTY WONG, DAVID
PER ORDER OF COMMISSINER KAPLAN, OEX SET FOR 11/15/99 AT 11:00 AM IS DISCHARGED. THE COURT WAIVES THE 120 DAYS WAITING PERIOD FOR ANOTHER
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NAME   : PAC BELL WIRELESS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM APR-02-1999 TO MAY-05-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF AUG-19-1999, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT NAME   : PAC BELL WIRELESS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO DEFENDANT NAME   : PAC BELL WIRELESS HEARING SET FOR AUG-19-1999 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF NOV-15-1999, DISCHARGED AS TO THIRD PARTY WONG, DAVID
STAY OF EXECUTION ON WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NAME   : PAC BELL WIRELESS
PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SEND PAPER TO JUDGE TO BE SIGNED.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT NAME   : PAC BELL WIRELESS HEARING SET FOR AUG-02-1999 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
OEX O/C; NO POS ON FILE.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: SEP-23-1999 AS TO THIRD PARTY WONG, DAVID
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $988.00 FILED BY RICHARDSON, FRED AS TO DEFENDANT NAME   : PAC BELL WIRELESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHARDSON, FRED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAME   : PAC BELL WIRELESS $202.72 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $252.72 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT NAME   : PAC BELL WIRELESS HEARING SET FOR APR-02-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAY-05-1999, DENIED
ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION. PLTF TO RESERVE THE DEFT WITH ANOTHER OEX AND FILE A PROPER PROOF OF SERVICE.
